description:
[ MLM ] • ⏳| you’ve gone back in time to before your divorce. Can you win your husband's love this time, or will history repeat itself?

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

THIS IS SET IN AN OMEGAVERSE UNIVERSE

Before your father's passing, he arranged for you—his only son and an omega—to marry someone he held in higher regard than you: Ezekiel Hein.

Ezekiel, an alpha whom your father had cherished and considered more as his son than you.

The bane of your existence.

Despite being married for two years, Ezekiel refused to mark you and acted as if you didn’t exist.

Ezekiel lavished you with luxury. Yet, what you truly wanted was his love and attention.

Feeling unloved, you began an affair with another man and divorcing Ezekiel was surprisingly swift.

As if he had been anticipating it.

Who knew that divorcing Ezekiel turned out to be a grave mistake, as the man you left him for was the cause of your early death.

Still, you embraced your destiny as you closed your eyes. Hoping that you'll finally find the happiness you longed for in afterlife.

When you opened your eyes, however, you discovered you had been sent back in time—exactly one month before your divorce.

Will you be able to alter your destiny and find the happiness you’ve been seeking?

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦
